title: 3 Fascinating Facts About The Ocean

segments.text: We know more about outer space than our oceans.
But there's so much more to explore.
Over 80% of the ocean is unexplored and unmapped.
And some deep-sea creatures are bioluminescent!
What's hiding in the ocean's depths?
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Dive into these ocean facts that will astound you! Follow for daily facts! 🌊
